name: Yuki
message: "Ah, what a pain. I'm late because that guy was so slow ringing up my order."
I looked at the clock.
It was after 11, about the time when fourth period would be starting.

name: Yuki
message: "Um, also because the train was so slow getting here, maybe? Or something like that."
Though that still didn't explain all the lost time, did it?

name: Yuki
message: "And because the shower took so long. Or something like that."

name: Yuki
message: "I guess that's the reason I'm late."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, that's the bell. Third period is over."

name: Yuki
message: "Ooh, just barely made it. I made it to morning classes, so I can just say my alarm clock didn't go off or something."
Vertigo again?
Lately, I've been feeling dizzy all the time.
Maybe I really am sick.

name: Takuji
message: "Shut up!"

name: Kagami
message: "You're the one who needs to shut up!"

name: Takuji
message: "What did you say, you whore?!"

name: Kagami
message: "Wh-Whore? You're one to talk, you little brat!"

name: Takuji
message: "What did you say?!"

name: Takuji
message: "You dare say those words to one who has reached true enlightenment?! Y-You're the little brat!"

name: Kagami
message: "Don't fucking say that!"
What's happening?
It looked like Kagami and Takuji were fighting.

name: Kagami
message: "Don't say crap like that. Everyone's already scared as it is!"

name: Takuji
message: "It's not crap. It's the truth!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "W-Wait, Onee-chan, calm down. You too, Mamiya-kun."

name: Takuji
message: "I am calm. Aren't you the ones losing your calm?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "U-Um, maybe, but could we please talk without raising our voices?"

name: Takuji
message: "I'm not raising my voice! It simply sounds that way because your ears are not capable of comprehending the truth entering them!"

name: Iida
message: "Everyone sit down. Class is starting."

name: Yuki
message: "Mr. Iida, the world history teacher."

name: Iida
message: "Come on, why are you just standing around?"

name: Kagami
message: "Oh! Yes, sir!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh, oh..."

name: Iida
message: "Everyone sit down! Class is starting."

name: Iida
message: "Mamiya, why are you still standing?"

name: Iida
message: "What's wrong? Quit spacing out and sit down."

name: Mamiya
message: "Do I look like I'm spacing out?"

name: Iida
message: "Come on, Mamiya, your grades have fallen far enough. Would you quit asking stupid questions and sit down already?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Hehehe. A stupid question, is it? If you say so."

name: Iida
message: "Okay, class is starting. Turn to page 67. Today, we're covering the Roman Emp―"

name: Takuji
message: "Mr. Iida!"

name: Iida
message: "Something wrong? Or would you like to let me start class already?"

name: Iida
message: "What's wrong, Mamiya? Do you need to go to the bathroom?"

name: Takuji
message: "You really are one of the vulgar people. That's why you can't see the big picture."

name: Iida
message: "Did you say something, Mamiya?"

name: Takuji
message: "You don't even know that it's all about to end."

name: Iida
message: "It's all about to end? What are you going on about now?"

name: Takuji
message: "For instance, if we were on a sinking ship, would you be standing at the bow reciting facts about the Roman Empire?"

name: Iida
message: "Mamiya, what are you saying?"

name: Takuji
message: "It's a question. A question. Would you be talking about some trivia from thousands of years ago while the ship sank around you?"

name: Iida
message: "History isn't just trivia. And this isn't a boat. It's a classroom, and it's not sinking."

name: Takuji
message: "I see. It's not a boat, it's not sinking, and your description of long-dead emperors isn't just trivia."

name: Iida
message: "That's right. Well, Mamiya? Have any more complaints?"

name: Takuji
message: "I have no complaints. It's rather obvious that a vulgar peasant such as yourself wouldn't be able to see the truth."

name: Takuji
message: "After all, no one complains that cats and dogs can't do arithmetic, do they?"

name: Iida
message: "Mamiya, are you feeling all right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Feeling all right? Whatever do you mean? Maybe you should ask that of yourself, the one doing something so meaningless at a time like this."

name: Iida
message: "What do you mean, meaningless?"

name: Takuji
message: "Please, consider this. The world may have been created by a demon just ten seconds ago, and everything we call history was planted in our heads by that demon."

name: Iida
message: "That's impossible. There's plenty of historical evidence that contradicts that idea."

name: Takuji
message: "Then maybe the demon made that too. Maybe it planted the historical evidence."

name: Iida
message: "Mamiya, are you sure you're feeling all right? What's wrong?"

name: Takuji
message: "Even if it wasn't a demon, this textbook may simply be a collection of humanity's convenient rationalizations."

name: Takuji
message: "The truth may be that there are much greater things in this world, and someone wrote this book in order to conceal them."

name: Iida
message: "Who's the class representative?"

name: Female Student
message: "M-Me, sir."

name: Iida
message: "Please go to the staff room and ask them to send Ms. Kiyokawa."

name: Female Student
message: "Y-Yes. Understood."
The moment the class representative passed by Takuji...
He pushed her violently, and she crumpled to the floor.

name: Female Student
message: "Aah!"

name: Iida
message: "Mamiya, you―!"

name: Kagami
message: "Y-You little...!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Onee-chan..."
Kagami stood defiantly in front of Mamiya.

name: Kagami
message: "What's wrong with you?! How dare you hit a girl?!"

name: Takuji
message: "It doesn't matter whether she's a boy or a girl."

name: Takuji
message: "That you're doing this at all, sitting here and playing along with this farce, when everything is about to end... It's absurd!"

name: Takuji
message: "Every single person here has turned their back on the truth!"

name: Iida
message: "Cut it out, Mamiya! Are you okay?"

name: Female Student
message: "I-I'm fine. I just fell because he surprised me."

name: Takuji
message: "Hmph."

name: Iida
message: "Mamiya, apologize!"

name: Takuji
message: "Why would I do that?"

name: Iida
message: "Mamiya, do you understand what you're saying?"

name: Iida
message: "What do you mean, the world is ending? I heard a lot of the students have been scared of something lately. Are you the one spreading those rumors?"

name: Takuji
message: "It means the world is ending, that's all."

name: Takuji
message: "The end of everything."

name: Takuji
message: "You could call it the final destination."

name: Takuji
message: "It's no rumor. It's merely the truth."

name: Takuji
message: "You are a weak human being, a small human being, and therefore you cannot even lay eyes on me."

name: Iida
message: "Mamiya, come over here!"

name: Takuji
message: "Haha. So you intend to use violence because you can't win with logic?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?!"

name: Kagami
message: "Ah!"
No one could understand what had just happened.
Just that a loud sound echoed through the classroom, and then the teacher fell down, covered in blood.
We were too confused to understand that Mamiya had just struck him with a flower vase.

name: Female Student
message: "Th-That's..."

name: Female Student
message: "I-It's just like the email said."

name: Yuki
message: "Email?"
That word seemed out of place, but before I could ask what she meant...

name: Female Student
message: "Aaaaahh!"
Someone screamed, sending the rest of the class into a panic.

name: Male Student
message: "Wh-What just..."

name: Male Student
message: "Is... Is he dead?"
They made a lot of noise over the collapsed teacher, but no one did anything to Mamiya Takuji except sneak glances from the corners of their eyes.
Because they were afraid of him? Because they believed they mustn't look at his face?
But Mamiya Takuji simply stood there and smiled.

name: Takuji
message: "What's wrong? You seem awfully scared of something."

name: Kagami
message: "He's... bleeding."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Onee-chan, we have to help him."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Auugh."

name: Kagami
message: "Tsukasa!"
When Tsukasa tried to go over to the teacher, Takuji threw her to the side.
She fell to the ground.

name: Yuki
message: "Mamiya Takuji! You son of a..."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, if it isn't Minakami-san."

name: Takuji
message: "It would appear you're no better than the rest of the poor little lambs here."

name: Takuji
message: "Your heart is thick with fear."

name: Takuji
message: "You should just stand back and watch in fear, like you've been doing."

name: Takuji
message: "And then you shall feel the flames of hell licking at your flesh."

name: Yuki
message: "Mamiya..."

name: Takuji
message: "What, are you going to hit me?"

name: Takuji
message: "You're going to bully me, just like Yuuki Tomosane and the rest of humanity have?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
Again...
What's this feeling?
When I was near Mamiya, I got dizzy.
Why did it keep happening?

name: Takuji
message: "Mark my words, all ye who quiver in fear."

name: Takuji
message: "All life shall end on the 20th! That is the absolute truth!"

name: Takuji
message: "Both Shiroyama and Takashima died for this truth!"

name: Takuji
message: "Death, that is the message of prophecy!"

name: Takuji
message: "Death, that is the absolute truth!"

name: Takuji
message: "Why is death the message that leads to prophecy?"

name: Takuji
message: "Because the foolish attempt to conceal death!"

name: Takuji
message: "So we must speak of that which is concealed!"

name: Takuji
message: "That which conceals death! The first is education! The second is the media!"

name: Takuji
message: "In countries such as this, mandatory education has become commonplace. In our society, the media has swelled and transformed into the highest authority in the world!"

name: Takuji
message: "We have a host of taboos implanted into our minds by public education and through the mass media."

name: Takuji
message: "The greatest taboo of all is to think upon death!"

name: Takuji
message: "We have put aside any thought of death! We are obliged to act as if our daily lives will continue for eternity!"

name: Takuji
message: "And the reason is because everything is powerless, everything is meaningless before the unreasoning specter of death!"

name: Takuji
message: "That is why education and the media try to disguise the true meaning of death!"

name: Takuji
message: "The death they intimate to us is but a phantasm on the far shores, something with which we have no relation. It has been reduced to a mere toy, something you can enjoy without worrying that it may ever strike you."

name: Takuji
message: "But the reality that everyone knows is that every single day, death creeps ever closer to all the people on the planet. Death is reality itself."

name: Iida
message: "M-Mamiya... you..."

name: Female Student
message: "Mr. Iida!"

name: Female Student
message: "H-He's okay..."

name: Iida
message: "You're wrong..."

name: Takuji
message: "What have I said that's wrong?"

name: Iida
message: "That religious nonsense... You..."

name: Takuji
message: "Did you hear that?"

name: Takuji
message: "Just now, this man called my thoughts 'religious nonsense.'"

name: Takuji
message: "As if to say I was a 'madman'."

name: Iida
message: "Th-That's wrong..."

name: Takuji
message: "Am I wrong? To ponder upon death... Has religion not advanced thought on mortality for the past several thousand years? Has metaphysics not?"

name: Takuji
message: "In other words, that which reeks of religion, the action of contemplating death, seems to him the action of a madman. Am I wrong?"

name: Iida
message: "You're wrong... You sound like a cultist..."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, really? What a strange thing you've just said. What part of what I'm saying seems crazy to you?"

name: Iida
message: "I don't know, but..."

name: Takuji
message: "If you ask me, it seems like you have unfounded conviction for that dogma which you call common sense."

name: Iida
message: "What are you talking about?"

name: Takuji
message: "You can't resist attaching the label 'crazy' to that which you cannot understand. You declare anything which would overthrow your common sense to be the words of a madman."

name: Iida
message: "Y-You're twisting my words... Mamiya, you..."

name: Iida
message: "Please. Someone call the homeroom teacher! Someone!"
He desperately appealed to the students, but not a single one moved.
Every person in the room was dominated by the atmosphere.

name: Takuji
message: "Modern society has reduced death to an abstraction. It is a society that views death as a taboo!"

name: Takuji
message: "The only ones who could speak of that as correct are slaves who have not even the capacity to think!"

name: Takuji
message: "In previous generations, death was the most important subject of philosophical thought, was it not?!"

name: Takuji
message: "Was death not the matter of utmost concern?!"

name: Takuji
message: "And despite that, modern governments and societies have treated it as if it was irrelevant to our lives."

name: Kagami
message: "You're labeling their deaths with your own selfish reasoning."

name: Takuji
message: "Selfish, you say?"

name: Kagami
message: "It's sophistry. It's complete nonsense!"

name: Kagami
message: "I've heard that theory about society covering up death before. Let's say you're right about that one. Even then, what you're saying about those two deaths signifying something is nothing but fabrication."

name: Kagami
message: "It's nonsense. A delusion."

name: Takuji
message: "I see. You're pretty smart for a whore."

name: Kagami
message: "Stop calling me that!"

name: Takuji
message: "I suppose this is what you're trying to say. You want me to show you proof that the meaning I've claimed for their death is veracious."

name: Kagami
message: "Proof? Are you stupid? There's nothing you could show us that would prove that. After all, no matter how you look at it, you're just spouting fantasies!"

name: Takuji
message: "Fantasies, huh? Do you know how we differentiate between science and charlatanry?"

name: Kagami
message: "Science and charlatanry?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes. How would one differentiate science from pseudoscience?"

name: Kagami
message: "I-It's obvious that pseudoscience is fake."

name: Takuji
message: "You can't just say it's obvious that X is Y when that statement has no logical basis."

name: Takuji
message: "The difference between science and pseudoscience lies in whether or not the theory makes novel predictions."

name: Kagami
message: "Novel predictions?"

name: Takuji
message: "The word prediction sounds almost religious, doesn't it? To put it simply, a novel prediction is a truthful prediction that may appear strange to the layman, but can be derived from the theory."

name: Takuji
message: "Einstein made many predictions. Black holes, the curvature of space... Those are predictions derived from his theory of relativity."

name: Takuji
message: "To the people who couldn't understand his theory, they seemed like very strange predictions."

name: Takuji
message: "But they were all correct. Do you know why?"

name: Kagami
message: "If his theory was correct..."

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, the theory of relativity was correct, and so he was able to derive correct predictions from it."

name: Takuji
message: "In other words, if the predictions I make based on my theory, if those predictions come true, then my theory is correct."

name: Kagami
message: "Predictions?"

name: Takuji
message: "Therefore, I shall now make several novel predictions."

name: Takuji
message: "And as they bear fruit, one by one, you will all quiver with fear."

name: Takuji
message: "You will see that I am correct..."

name: Kagami
message: "That's all drivel."

name: Takuji
message: "God sacrificed these two so that I could be reborn!"

name: Takuji
message: "The first was Shiroyama Tsubasa, and the second was Takashima Zakuro. God sacrificed them so that I could be reborn!"

name: Takuji
message: "I have been reborn!"

name: Takuji
message: "As what?"

name: Takuji
message: "The savior."

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, as the savior!"

name: Takuji
message: "The world will end in five days."

name: Takuji
message: "But that is an omen of greater things."

name: Takuji
message: "An omen that the world will be reborn."

name: Takuji
message: "Those not saved, along with the old world, will fall into the depths of hell to suffer for eternity."

name: Takuji
message: "An eternity of torment!"

name: Takuji
message: "Everyone knows..."

name: Takuji
message: "That the world is pervaded by lies! That the truth is hidden!"

name: Takuji
message: "The foolish speak of equality!"

name: Takuji
message: "But everyone knows that the world is not equal!"

name: Takuji
message: "The foolish speak of freedom!"

name: Takuji
message: "But everyone knows that there is no freedom in the world!"

name: Takuji
message: "The foolish speak of love!"

name: Takuji
message: "But everyone knows that love is traitorous!"

name: Takuji
message: "The foolish say that you must not kill!"

name: Takuji
message: "But everyone knows that the world is brimming with murderers!"

name: Takuji
message: "The foolish say that you must not lie!"

name: Takuji
message: "But everyone knows that the foolish themselves are lying!"

name: Takuji
message: "Those who swallow the lies of the foolish make fools of themselves!"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, their lies!"

name: Takuji
message: "They were all lies!"

name: Takuji
message: "That the world has always existed..."

name: Takuji
message: "And that the world will continue to exist forevermore!"

name: Takuji
message: "They are all lies!"

name: Takuji
message: "The path we walk leads to..."

name: Takuji
message: "The abyss!"

name: Takuji
message: "The world will end!"

name: Takuji
message: "It will surely end!"

name: Takuji
message: "This is the truth!"

name: Takuji
message: "As proof, I shall make three predictions."

name: Takuji
message: "Firstly! The thickness of death in the air will be affirmed with yet another death!"

name: Takuji
message: "Secondly! A large number of people will witness the death!"

name: Takuji
message: "Thirdly! The deceased will speak of..."

name: Takuji
message: "The ultimate demise!"
Mamiya dashed out of the classroom.
Everyone was speechless at his sudden departure.
After a long silence, another teacher came running in, and the classroom was filled with chatter.
Kagami helped Tsukasa up.
I just stood there.

name: Yuki
message: "The world is pervaded by lies, and the truth is hidden, huh?"
Why did I simply stand by and watch?
Why didn't I say anything back to him?
Because I was dizzy?
Because my head hurt?
That's no excuse. It wasn't so bad that I wasn't able to at least say a single word.
I couldn't speak at all.
I just listened to Kagami yelling at him.
I just listened to Mamiya Takuji gleefully listing his predictions.
I couldn't do anything.
I wonder what I was supposed to do back there.
I wonder what I was supposed to do to Mamiya Takuji back there.

name: Yuki
message: "Otonashi Ayana-san..."

name: Ayana
message: "Good morning."

name: Yuki
message: "Good morning. So you're cutting class too?"

name: Ayana
message: "Well, yes."

name: Yuki
message: "I see. So what were you doing?"

name: Ayana
message: "Looking."

name: Yuki
message: "At the sky again?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes."

name: Yuki
message: "The sky, huh?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yeah."

name: Yuki
message: "I see."

name: Ayana
message: "Minakami-san, why are you crying?"

name: Yuki
message: "Crying?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yeah."

name: Yuki
message: "Doesn't the word 'crying' usually refer to someone who's shedding tears?"

name: Ayana
message: "Does it? I'm not sure. I just had a feeling."

name: Yuki
message: "Nothing worth crying over happened, but..."

name: Ayana
message: "But?"

name: Yuki
message: "I don't really feel that great, either."

name: Ayana
message: "You don't feel that great?"

name: Yuki
message: "Nope."

name: Ayana
message: "Because a lot has happened?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, maybe. A lot has happened lately. I'm getting worn out."

name: Yuki
message: "What about you?"

name: Ayana
message: "What about me?"

name: Yuki
message: "I was just wondering, how do you feel?"

name: Ayana
message: "How do I feel?"

name: Yuki
message: "It's just that two of our classmates died in such a short period of time, and the whole school is going wild with rumors."

name: Ayana
message: "Rumors?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh... I see. You don't know about them, do you?"

name: Ayana
message: "Is it about the messages from Takashima Zakuro-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "You knew?"

name: Ayana
message: "Sort of."

name: Yuki
message: "Did you get one of those messages on your phone too?"

name: Ayana
message: "I don't have a cell phone. I received something else."

name: Yuki
message: "Something else? Wait, what is it?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, something from Takashima-san."

name: Yuki
message: "From Takashima-san?!"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes."

name: Yuki
message: "What is it?"

name: Ayana
message: "Do you want to see?"

name: Yuki
message: "Um... Well, of course, if you say it like that. But what do you mean? Is it okay?"

name: Ayana
message: "What do you mean by 'okay'?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, uh... I don't really know how to put it."

name: Ayana
message: "How about we say, if it's okay with you?"

name: Yuki
message: "Why me? Is it something that shocking?"

name: Ayana
message: "Who knows? I couldn't say."

name: Ayana
message: "It's just something that you've hidden."

name: Yuki
message: "Me?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, though more accurately, it's not something you've hidden. It's something that's been hidden from you."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean. I don't really understand. D-Do you know something?"

name: Ayana
message: "I only know that which you know."

name: Yuki
message: "What I know?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. Your limit is the limit of the world. Therefore, I am unable to tell or show you anything which you are not capable of seeing or speaking of."

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-What do you mean?"

name: Ayana
message: "To put it clearly, that of which you can speak..."

name: Ayana
message: "Is only that which you have seen. I can't show you anything else."

name: Yuki
message: "What I've seen?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?!"

name: Ayana
message: "Why do humans try to hide things?"

name: Yuki
message: "What are you talking about?"

name: Ayana
message: "Even though they know something, they act as if they don't, and then one day they truly do forget."

name: Ayana
message: "They still want to know it, even after they've forgotten it."

name: Yuki
message: "Ayana-san..."

name: Ayana
message: "Actually, I heard a voice from Mamiya-kun's classroom."

name: Yuki
message: "Mamiya told everyone about how people have hidden death. He says the world has hidden death."

name: Ayana
message: "Then why do people try to dig it up after they've gone through all the trouble of hiding it?"

name: Ayana
message: "Why are people captivated by death once they've finally managed to hide it out of sight?"

name: Ayana
message: "They put so much effort into hiding it, and yet they dig it up again."

name: Ayana
message: "Minakami-san, you too are trying to unearth something which you've hidden."

name: Ayana
message: "It's exactly the same thing."

name: Yuki
message: "Something I've hidden?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, if you manage to conceal it, or..."

name: Yuki
message: "Or?"

name: Ayana
message: "The Wonderful Everyday."

name: Yuki
message: "The Wonderful Everyday?"

name: Ayana
message: "People live within the eternity of life."

name: Yuki
message: "People live within eternity? What are you talking about?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. Life is a closed box. After all, death opens its doors for no one."

name: Ayana
message: "If you manage to conceal it, you will know nothing."

name: Ayana
message: "Just like that, the Wonderful Everyday will be constructed upon the silence whereupon you cannot speak."

name: Ayana
message: "Without thinking of death, without knowing death, in the middle of life."

name: Ayana
message: "Just like the cat that one day crossed your path. Just like the dog that one night howled while you slept."

name: Ayana
message: "Walking gingerly upon the top of a fence. Howling as if to devour the crescent moon."

name: Ayana
message: "Like a kitten, ending the lives of those smaller than itself. Like a puppy, looking up at people with submissive eyes."

name: Ayana
message: "Like a cat, passing the night in solitude. Like a dog, amongst a great mass of companions."

name: Ayana
message: "Thinking not of life, yet knowing life."

name: Ayana
message: "Within it, or without it, the Wonderful Everyday will..."
Her voice was quiet.
And her eyes were lucid.
She seemed to know everything. She seemed to see everything.
She gave me goosebumps.
But...

name: Yuki
message: "Ayana-san, what is it that you know?"

name: Ayana
message: "Only that which you know."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehe. I don't like people who do nothing but ask questions."

name: Yuki
message: "I don't really want people to like me anyways."

name: Ayana
message: "Hehe."
What she knows...
I was scared of that truth, and...
I wanted to know it, too.

name: Ayana
message: "Do you want to go outside?"

name: Yuki
message: "Outside?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. To the next world."

name: Yuki
message: "The next world?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes."

name: Yuki
message: "You're starting to sound like Mamiya Takuji."

name: Ayana
message: "Really? Do I sound cool?"

name: Yuki
message: "Not at all... It's pretty gross."

name: Ayana
message: "I thought I sounded cool talking about the outside world and the next world. They sound like they would be nice."

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm, so then what is that 'outside'? What's the next world?"

name: Yuki
message: "You mean heaven? Or some other afterlife? Or a higher plane of existence? Either way..."

name: Ayana
message: "Does it sound absurd?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah."

name: Ayana
message: "Hehe, yes. It's just as you say."

name: Ayana
message: "There is no outside world."

name: Ayana
message: "Everything is our world. No matter how far you go, it is our world."

name: Ayana
message: "Whether you stay here or forge ahead, all of it is our world."

name: Ayana
message: "If there is an afterlife, that too is certainly part of our world. If a higher plane exists, that too is part of our world."

name: Ayana
message: "Even if Heaven exists, even if Hell exists, all of them are certainly part of our world."

name: Ayana
message: "Even if I were to make an annotation, even if I were to add something from outside the world, that too would become a new part of our world."

name: Yuki
message: "No, I don't think you could call that part either old or new."

name: Ayana
message: "Heh, hehehe."

name: Ayana
message: "Then the world you can see from here, your world, is neither old nor new."

name: Ayana
message: "Do you think this annotation is correct, Minakami-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "What?!"
Ayana-san slowly brought her face closer to mine.
Then she headbutted me with a conk.

name: Yuki
message: "A-Ayana-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "Wha―"

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-What was..."

name: Ayana
message: "Hehe."

name: Yuki
message: "Just now, Takashima-san was..."

name: Ayana
message: "I can show you anything you possess."

name: Yuki
message: "What I possess? What does that mean?"

name: Ayana
message: "Minakami-san, have you heard this?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm?"

name: Ayana
message: "How many souls does a world require?"

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Ayana
message: "Exactly what I said."

name: Ayana
message: "The necessary number of souls in a world. Most likely, one is enough."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean, Ayana-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Ayana-san?"
She wasn't there anymore...
No one was there...
While I was on the rooftop killing time, all of the day's classes had ended.
I had no reason to be at school after classes were over, so I decided to go back to the classroom for the moment.

name: Kagami
message: "Ah, Yuki!"

name: Yuki
message: "Kagami..."

name: Kagami
message: "Yuki."

name: Kagami
message: "You were cutting class again."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. Sorry."

name: Kagami
message: "Like I care!"

name: Yuki
message: "'Like I care'? Did you get that out of some shoujo manga?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hey, Kagami-san. What are you so mad about?"

name: Kagami
message: "Nothing."

name: Yuki
message: "It doesn't seem like nothing."

name: Kagami
message: "I'm not mad."

name: Kagami
message: "We have a practice match with another team, so don't bother me."

name: Yuki
message: "Kagami!"

name: Kagami
message: "Ah."

name: Yuki
message: "Kagami, what's wrong?"

name: Kagami
message: "Nothing's wrong."

name: Yuki
message: "Kagami..."

name: Kagami
message: "I have to go to my club."
Haa...
Maybe it's because I skipped class to get out of there.
I suppose I shouldn't be surprised, after I ran off and left her alone in there.
Sorry about that.

name: Yuki
message: "Tsukasa."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Sorry. Would you mind leaving her alone for a little while?"

name: Yuki
message: "All right."
Maybe Tsukasa is mad at me too.
As soon as I got home, I turned on my computer.

name: Yuki
message: "I wonder if they approved my registration."
I immediately opened my email and checked the messages.

name: Yuki
message: "I want to meet you soon."

name: Yuki
message: "All I want is sex."

name: Yuki
message: "My husband was raped by a giant anteater."
They were almost all spam.
All this spam sure is annoying.
The guy sending out all this crap should go kill himself.

name: Yuki
message: "Registration complete. Kita High message board SAWAYAKA Secretariat."
The title almost looked like spam at first glance, but it wasn't.
This was the first step in following the trail of breadcrumbs.
My pulse quickened a little bit.

name: Yuki
message: "Here I go."
I opened the email.
Hello, Shibata Katsuie-san.
This is the secretariat for the Kita High message board, SAWAYAKA.
Thank you for registering on the Kita High underground message board.
Your member registration has been completed.
You may log into the site with the login credentials you provided at the time of registration, which are also listed below.
Please make another copy of this information and keep it in a safe place.
Login ID:
YA!KI!U!CHI!
Password:
SI!ZU!GA!TA!KE!Suicide!
This name and the ID and password definitely were mine.

name: Yuki
message: "They actually approved it."
If they actually approved something like "Shibata Katsuie," that meant the administrator was just approving any registration without even thinking about it. It might've even been automatic approval.
I wondered who the administrator was.
I clicked the link.
It was the typical style of floating thread message board.
The threads with the most recent posts were displayed closest to the top of the page.
So the threads dropped to the bottom if there weren't many responses, though they could rise to the top again if they got responses.
Apparently, this kind of message board got its name from the way threads at the bottom could float up to the top.

name: Yuki
message: "I figured there would just be a few threads, but it's pretty popular, huh?"
Though there probably weren't this many threads until just recently.

name: Yuki
message: "Takashima Zakuro's death... Mamiya Takuji's speech... Is it true that the world is going to end... There weren't very many threads before all this happened, so the entire board is covered with threads on this topic."
And the one that particularly stood out...
1: Who shall be saved and who shall not
This thread was created today at 11:23 a.m.
Mamiya Takuji himself made it.
1: Mamiya Takuji: 2012/07/15(Wed) 11:23:12 ID:mamiya
Many of you have confirmed it.
Many of you have seen it.
Takashima's message predicted my awakening.
I am standing here now.
As the savior.
Now it is time to determine who will be saved and who will not.
2: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/15(Wed) 11:26:15 ID:KAERA
Another one right after Takashima?
Knock it off with that crap.
3: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/15(Wed) 11:30:20 ID:inkin
I reported you to the police.
4: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/15(Wed) 11:35:40 ID: ADAMO
lol they still haven't caught you yet?
Not surprisingly, Mamiya's thread was full of trolls.
Though of course no one was taking him seriously.
I was a bit relieved.
I'd heard several people went missing after the incident earlier, but evidently they were unrelated.
Everyone was just making fun of his posts on here.

name: Yuki
message: "Well then, let's start checking these out. I'd better start with the ones that are about to disappear."
I looked for the oldest of the threads that had topped 1,000 posts and gotten locked.

name: Yuki
message: "This might be it."
97: Thread for discussion of the falling accident.
The date was 7/10. This thread was about Shiroyama's accident.
1: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/10(Fri) 15:20:12 ID:marudai
It's been coming up in other threads, but I made this thread to talk about it exclusively.
2: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/10(Fri) 15:21:15 ID:KAERA
It's kind of rude to start a thread about someone's death.
3: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/10(Fri) 15:22:20 ID:inkin
Was it really Shiroyama from Class 3?
4: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/10(Fri) 15:25:40 ID: ADAMO
～This thread has peacefully ended～
25: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/11(Sat) 00:20:12 ID:KINKIN
Kita High, 3rd year, class 6, seat number 12
Shiroyama Tsubasa
Height: 175cm, Weight: 62kg
Date of Birth: 5/10
Blood Type: A
26: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/11(Sat) 00:20:45 ID:Aanana
lol where'd you get that? did you measure him yourself lolol
27: Takashima Zakuro: 2012/07/11(Sat) 00:20:46 ID:zakuro
His death was inevitable.
This reply, #27, was posted with a registered name.
Was this... Takashima Zakuro-san herself?
So she was posting on here...
28: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/11(Sat) 01:21:25 ID:kintama
Seriously, learn some tact.
29: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/11(Sat) 01:22:16 ID:aria
Takashima Zakuro's in class three, right? I bet she killed him.
30: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/11(Sat) 01:22:50 ID:anaana
Your name is Takashima-san? I think you need to be a little more respectful.
31: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/11(Sat) 01:31:20 ID:meka
what a freak
Everyone was insulting her.
That was to be expected, since she said that right after his death.
But why?
32: Takashima Zakuro: 2012/07/11(Sat) 01:50:15 ID:zakuro
His death is just the beginning.
33: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/11(Sat) 01:51:20 ID:kinako
lol it's just the beginning she says. does that mean our token black guy dies next?
34: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/11(Sat) 01:53:21 ID:aida
I think there really is a problem with what you're saying, Takashima.
35: Takashima Zakuro: 2012/07/11(Sat) 02:00:25 ID:zakuro
But this is all according to prophecy...
36: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/11(Sat) 02:02:11 ID:kanakana
now she thinks there's a prophecy lol
37: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/11(Sat) 02:03:21 ID:kanakana
where's your tinfoil hat?
Was Takashima-san the one who started all this?
Before Mamiya Takuji...
But still, a prophecy...
It seemed like that was Takashima-san's last post in that thread.
Takashima-san's posts were ignored, and the thread about Shiroyama's accident went on to a thousand posts.
I looked for other threads.

name: Yuki
message: "This is..."
74: Bick Hazard is coming.
1: Takashima Zakuro: 2012/07/11(Sat) 22:02:13 ID:zakuro
The sealed nevus uses a Specialized Physics Bug (i.e. an Outer Magic Dark Summons Bug) to plant negative thoughts in the human race.
That is the true nature of the battle between the dictators and tyrants of the world (Hitler, Genghis Khan, Marie Antoinette, etc.) and us (the peasants, the revolutionaries, the proletariat).
Shiroyama Tsubasa was infected by the Specialized Physics Bug.
The nevus used him to degrade me (the phenomenon of inducing a low energy state with a negative energy blast).
And the reason is because the nevus will soon awaken. Bick Hazard is coming.
A great disaster will occur!
2: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/11(Sat) 22:10:15 ID:KAERA
Stay away from me, Bick Hazard.
ｎｎ 　 ｎｎ
ヽ　,イ 　ヽ :イ
3: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/11(Sat) 22:16:25 ID:KAERA
lol
4: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/11(Sat) 22:17:23 ID:KAERA
∧  ∧ ∩Pls
(つ ﾉ　　⊂　　   ﾉ　 ∧  ∧ ∩away
(ノ　　 ⊂　　 ﾉ
(つ ﾉ　  ∧  ∧ ∩from
kthx
5: Takashima Zakuro: 2012/07/11(Sat) 22:21:13 ID:zakuro
Don't joke around!
They weren't going to take her seriously.
She sounded crazy. I probably would've reacted the exact same way.
I didn't know what she was talking about, but it was full of hard words. I wasn't sure what else she expected anyone to say.
8: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/11(Sat) 23:28:21 ID:KAERA
Who's Bick Hazard? He sounds like some big guy.
9: Takashima Zakuro: 2012/07/11(Sat) 23:30:15 ID:zakuro
Bick Hazard is not a person. It is a great disaster.
10: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/11(Sat) 23:30:21 ID:daiki
Honestly, I think it's the aftershocks from the worldwide recession. Bick Hazard was the reason the ***son in front of the station closed down.
11: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/11(Sat) 23:30:21 ID:daiki
I know what you mean!
12: Takashima Zakuro: 2012/07/11(Sat) 23:30:15 ID:zakuro
That's wrong!
Yeah, it probably was wrong.
Though I didn't really know what Bick Hazard was either.
24: Takashima Zakuro: 2012/07/11(Sat) 23:31:45 ID:zakuro
The nevus implanted the Specialized Physics Bug in Shiroyama Tsubasa in order to induce a low energy state in one of the angel warriors, the only beings that can stop the nevus.

Every angel warrior was targeted by an assassin that was being manipulated by a Specialized Physics Bug. However, every Specialized Physics Bug within the barrier (Tokyo's 23rd Ward) has been exterminated with the combined power of the golden Angel Remover and the flashing blue Angel Night.
Since Shiroyama-kun's brain had already been devoured, he went insane and jumped from the rooftop when the Specialized Physics Bug disappeared.
After that, the thread was filled with trolls.
People making fun of her, people getting mad, people who sounded a little scared. But at this point, the people in the thread weren't terribly scared.
Everyone was just making a lot of noise over some crazy person on the Internet.
256: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/12(Sun) 00:30:21 ID:daiki
So then, when is the world going to end? You keep saying it's a prophecy, but all I hear you talking about is stuff that already happened. When is the world going to end?
257: Takashima Zakuro: 2012/07/12(Sun) 02:10:05 ID:zakuro
A great disaster will occur on July 20th, 2012.
258: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/12(Sun) 02:31:11 ID:daiki
lol next week?
265: Takashima Zakuro: 2012/07/12(Sun) 04:18:25 ID:zakuro
Not just a few people, but many people will die.
More than you can count. The planet will reach a bottleneck.
266: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/12(Sun) 04:31:21 ID:KAERA
A bottleneck?
267: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/12(Sun) 04:33:54 ID:daiki
A bottleneck... You could probably think of it as a genetic bottleneck.
A sudden decrease in genetic variety.
It's when a lot of animals die and their genetic strains disappear. Like she said, that would be a great disaster.
652: Takashima Zakuro: 2012/07/12(Sun) 05:18:25 ID:zakuro
We shall perform the Brain Reverse on July 12th, 2012.
Then everyone will know.
The fact that I am not human.
And the fact that the world is heading toward destruction.
She was writing about this "Brain Reverse" on the day she committed suicide?
Actually, isn't that word...
I looked at the words I'd copied off of Takashima-san's desk.

name: Yuki
message: "This really is the same as the scribbles that were on her desk."
Which meant there was no doubt the posts were made by Takashima-san.
Brain Reverse, Har Megiddo, Nebula Cloud, Elhimuro... Angel Remover... Angel Night... I am Angel Advise.

name: Yuki
message: "So Takashima-san is Angel Advise, and the two that she mentioned in the thread, Angel Remover and Angel Night, are..."
The other two that were with her.
It all made sense.
So I guess when she said, "I'm not human," she was saying that because she thought she was the angel warrior, Angel Advise.
856: Takashima Zakuro: 2012/07/12(Sun) 09:02:13 ID:zakuro
Bick Hazard shall arrive soon!
Nine o'clock in the morning, on the 12th. Apparently, that was her last post.
It was the day she performed the Brain Reverse. In other words, that's when she jumped from the rooftop.

name: Yuki
message: "What's this?"

name: Yuki
message: "This thread was made that evening. This would be right after her suicide."
71: I got something weird (||||▽￣)」 scary
1: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/12(Sun) 22:52:25 ID:MARUKOME
I got an email, but the picture and message are weird.
through death i have been reborn as a warrior
or so they said but it hurts
i have no body but
it still hurts
it hurts because i've been broken
therefore
everyone must die
you will die in 8 days
all of you will die
The address on this was takasimazakuro.
2: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/12(Sun) 22:55:12 ID:GENKI
I got one too （´・ω・）
3: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/12(Sun) 22:58:32 ID:KINDARMAN
That's the same as the one I got. What's up with that? Is it really from Takashima Zakuro?
After that, the thread was full of responses saying they had gotten the message too.
It looked like almost everyone on this message board had gotten one.
The same question I was thinking popped up in the thread.
50: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/12(Sun) 23:40:45 ID:WAKAWAK
Did they all come at the same time?
52: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/12(Sun) 23:45:05 ID:KITAMURA
Doesn't it look like they were all sent at the same time?
54: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/12(Sun) 23:48:45 ID:GENKI
I think it was around 10:44.
It looks like everyone's getting them at the same time.
55: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/12(Sun) 23:50:45 ID:WAKAWAK
Mine was right around 10:45, too.
I think they were all simultaneous...
Simultaneous transmission... Well, I suppose so.
Every single one was at the same time.
Which means...
The sender had a register of names or some collection of data like that.
Though, that was assuming that Takashima Zakuro wasn't the sender.

name: Yuki
message: "A register... Maybe a teacher? Though of course the school register doesn't have email addresses."
152: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 01:40:45 ID:satokon
It's kind of hard to say, but I think those messages really are from Takashima Zakuro.
I know because I had her address in my phone.
I don't know if someone else might be using it, but the messages are coming from Takashima's phone.
153: Akasaka Megu: 2012/07/13(M) 01:42:25 ID:megu
You're Satoko, right?
I have it too... That definitely is Takashima.
I mean, the address is the exact same... And the picture is from her phone too. Her phone's camera had a horrible resolution.
What should we do? That's Takashima's phone.
The picture is the same resolution as the pictures we took with it before.
The same as the ones we took at the restaurant.
Is Takashima alive?
155: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 01:51:11 ID:atata
Takashima died. She's not alive. That much is certain.
I'm scared... What should I do?
161: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 03:15:11 ID:atata
Why are you scared?
162: Akasaka Megu: 2012/07/13(M) 03:22:25 ID:megu
Takashima probably has a grudge against us... Was that message really from a ghost? Takashima's ghost?
Then I'm...
163: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 03:25:21 ID:atata
You guys bullied her?
It wasn't just us. At first, the whole class did it... Why just us?
165: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 03:33:31 ID:atata
What do you mean, "just us"?
I asked Akiko and Eri. The other people in our class didn't get the email.
167: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 03:40:42 ID:manaka
lol we got it and we don't even know her.
168: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 03:40:42 ID:kiri
It's your fault! Go die so she can rest in peace.
I didn't think it would... I didn't think it would turn out like this...
171: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 03:55:53 ID:akana
Who cares? You guys should be the only ones receiving her curse.
172: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 03:58:12 ID:kotoko
Actually, just before she died, didn't she say she wasn't human?
173: Anonymous Kita High Student
>We shall perform the Brain Reverse on July 12th, 2012.
>Then everyone will know.
>The fact that I am not human.
>And the fact that the world is heading toward destruction.
That's what she said.
Maybe she was already a ghost when she wrote that?
174: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 04:06:12 ID:mamada

Don't say stuff like that to confuse people.
392: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 11:42:53 ID:ikeda
The twentieth is way too soon for the world to end, but maybe it's when Takashima's curse will happen?
393: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 11:45:22 ID:mamada

394: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 11:48:52 ID:mini
So the world won't end.
395: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 11:55:52 ID:kimi
It means the people who bullied her will perish.
On the 20th, they'll be killed by the curse.
396: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 11:58:02 ID:tomoda
She was probably holding a grudge. That's why part of her curse was sending out that picture...
397: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 12:02:02 ID:kotoko
Um...
I googled this: July 20th, 2012 end of the world...
What the heck is this?
http:::org:webbotproject.com/
I clicked on the link.

name: Yuki
message: "Whoa..."

name: Yuki
message: "This page is really sketchy..."
Sketchy as hell. Everything on the page looked like a lie.

name: Yuki
message: "Nanakusa Ward, Tama City, Tokyo Metropolitan Area... Uh, the New White Lotus Association Web Bot Research Facility..."
Totally an occult page.

name: Yuki
message: "This has to be some random page that the search engine dragged up."
The page looked like it was thrown together in a few minutes. Would anyone really believe this?
It listed events predicted by the Web Bot.

name: Yuki
message: "I see..."
The anthrax attacks in America in 2001.
The east coast's Great Power Outage in 2003.
The earthquake and tsunami in Indonesia that caused 30,000 casualties.
Hurricane Katrina in 2005.

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, this is what they were talking about in class."
And the last one...
July 20th, 2012. Disaster level: Infinity.

name: Yuki
message: "Disaster level... infinity."
What's up with this prediction?
Is that really right?
This website was more than a little suspect.

name: Yuki
message: "But still..."
Even if it was just a coincidence, that was the same day Takashima-san predicted the world would end.

name: Yuki
message: "I can see why people might believe that."
The site was full of nonsensical explanations for its predictions.
This site must have been where Yokoyama was getting all her information.

name: Yuki
message: "Hm?"
Now there was there nigh unto the mountains a great herd of swine feeding.
And all the devils besought him, saying, send us into the swine, that we may enter into them.

And forthwith Jesus gave them leave. And the unclean spirits went out, and entered into the swine: and the herd ran violently down a steep place into the sea, (they were about two thousand;) and were choked in the sea.
And they that fed the swine fled, and told it in the city, and in the country. And they went out to see what it was that was done.
And they come to Jesus, and see him that was possessed with the devil, and had the legion, sitting, and clothed, and in his right mind: and they were afraid.
And they that saw it told them how it befell to him that was possessed with the devil, and also concerning the swine.
Those verses were written there.

name: Yuki
message: "This is... a verse from the Bible. Are they a Christian organization? I thought they were Nichiren Buddhists."
Kind of creepy.

name: Yuki
message: "Haa... I'm tired."
I'd been on the computer since I got home. Before I realized it, midnight had long since passed.

name: Yuki
message: "It's already starting to get brighter outside."

name: Yuki
message: "Haah... The sun comes up so early in the summer."
Well, that's because I was reading every thread one by one. That's why it took so long.

name: Yuki
message: "If I don't get some sleep soon, I'm not going to wake up until after noon."
I stopped what I was doing for the moment and crawled into bed.
